name: mcp-client
description: MCP client cluster — registry + stdio protocol + discovery + materialize-into-harness-configs + the MCP-Tools aggregator HTTP route. Talks to upstream MCP servers (the YHA-owned ones lifted into the `mcp-servers` module, plus any external ones the user adds to mcp-registry.json) and exposes their aggregate tool list to harnesses via `/proxy/mcp-bridge/rpc` (the stub) plus `/v1/mcp/*` REST. User state files (mcp-state.json, mcp-registry.json) intentionally stay at bridge/ root — they are user intent, not module state.
